features.title: Cross-Platform
features.description: Same commands work identically on Windows, macOS, and Linux. No platform-specific paths to remember.

features.title: Formula-Based
features.description: 3000+ fonts available through community-maintained formulas with automatic download and license handling.

features.title: Manifest Support
features.description: Define font requirements in YAML for reproducible installations across environments.

features.title: CI/CD Ready
features.description: Perfect for automated environments with non-interactive installation and GitHub Action available.

features.title: System Font Detection
features.description: Detects and indexes fonts already installed on your system. No redundant downloads.

features.title: Multiple Locations
features.description: Install to fontist directory, user fonts, or system fonts. Flexible for different use cases.

features.title: Fontconfig Integration
features.description: Optional fontconfig integration for seamless font discovery in Linux environments.

features.title: Custom Repositories
features.description: Add private formula repositories for internal or custom fonts.
